interactive.rationale: Typing @ or a backtick changes the textarea mode and updates a live computed-style readout.

references.rationale: The see-also section links to the CSS UI spec and https://chromestatus.com/feature/5082469066604544.

design_system.rationale: Raw inline colour styles were moved to CSS classes using variables from public/styles.css.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept's lede mirrors the feature index promise — same nouns, same scope.

spec_match.rationale: The demo now uses the real auto/manual caret-animation values instead of invalid blink/none shortcuts.

edge_cases.rationale: The gallery includes an invalid blink branch and the readout shows it computes back to auto.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: typed @ to enter mention mode and saw computed manual + mentionCaret, typed a backtick to enter code mode and saw computed manual + no animation, then focused the invalid keyword card and saw computed auto with CSS.supports('caret-animation: blink') false. Console/network were clean.
